description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Downloadable Content that runs every Sunday at 8:00am UTC and can be triggered manually with a dataset input. For each of the specified datasets (antique, aol-ia, aquaint, argsme, beir, c4, car, clinicaltrials, clirmatrix, clueweb09, clueweb12, codesearchnet, cord19, cranfield, dpr-w100), run a job on an ubuntu-latest environment that checks out the repository, sets up Python 3.x, installs dependencies from requirements.txt, tests downloads with a specific filter and randdelay, and uploads the resulting JSON artifact.
